prompt: At medium depth under pressure, choose call.
why_v1: Call controls risk when tournament pressure does not force fold or raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits the tournament cue set, so the line preserves equity without risking more than this pressure read can justify.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Calling is better here because medium-stack pressure is present but still calls for control rather than a forced raise.
